script:
They came back.

At this point I was convinced someone in the building was hacking me. Which is ridiculous because… who does that? For what? My 50 Mbps connection?

But then it got weirder.

One of the devices started uploading data.

Like… a LOT.

I could see real-time bandwidth usage, and it was spiking outbound traffic — not download, upload.

That’s when I unplugged the router completely.

Next morning, I went downstairs to ask around casually.
